timeline.label: Lateral Movement
timeline.event: An internal account attempted remote access across multiple servers in quick succession.

timeline.event: Dump domain hashes with directory sync abuse

timeline.event: Access file shares and sensitive databases

Access file shares and sensitive databases

predictions.title: Admin Control Attempt
predictions.description: The attacker may target Active Directory next.
predictions.why: This route appears consistently in the twin simulation and matches the current incident pattern.
predictions.next_action: Review activity around Active Directory and prepare containment.

explanation: TwinShield detected moving across systems behavior. The most likely next route is AD Compromise -> Full Domain Takeover with a 80% likelihood. The first follow-up move could happen in about 10 minutes, so early action matters.
plain_english: TwinShield detected moving across systems behavior. The most likely next route is AD Compromise -> Full Domain Takeover with a 80% likelihood. The first follow-up move could happen in about 10 minutes, so early action matters.

story_mode.headline: Here is the incident in plain language.
story_mode.narrative: An unusual event involving Service Account was detected on App Server. TwinShield believes this incident is in the moving across systems phase. The attacker may next attempt admin control attempt against Active Directory in about 10 minutes. If that succeeds, the path could continue toward gathering sensitive data.

chapters.title: How it started
chapters.text: An internal account attempted remote access across multiple servers in quick succession.

chapters.title: What we are seeing now
chapters.text: TwinShield believes this incident is in the moving across systems phase.

chapters.title: What may happen next
chapters.text: The attacker may next attempt admin control attempt against Active Directory in about 10 minutes.

chapters.title: Why it matters
chapters.text: If that succeeds, the path could continue toward gathering sensitive data.

simplified_terms.analogy: Like trying to upgrade from a visitor pass to a master key.
Like moving room to room inside a building after getting in.
Like pulling files together before taking them out.
Like carrying documents out of the building.

recommended_actions: Isolate the affected device from the network immediately.
Reset credentials for all accounts that accessed this device.
Enable MFA on all privileged accounts if not already active.
Block SMB and RDP from workstations to servers.
Audit Active Directory for new admin accounts.
